title: sscg bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.0.5-12]
- Fix IP address handling in CA certificate SAN constraints
- Add automatic single-IP subnet mask to IP addresses in CA name
  constraints
- Update help text to show simplified IP format without subnet mask
- Add comprehensive test for basicConstraints

[3.0.5-11]
- Ensure 'critical' basicConstraint for CA cert

[3.0.5-10]
- x509: Use proper version for CSR
full_text:
[3.0.5-12]
- Fix IP address handling in CA certificate SAN constraints
- Add automatic single-IP subnet mask to IP addresses in CA name
  constraints
- Update help text to show simplified IP format without subnet mask
- Add comprehensive test for basicConstraints

[3.0.5-11]
- Ensure 'critical' basicConstraint for CA cert

[3.0.5-10]
- x509: Use proper version for CSR

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20308-0.html
